prompt: Pretend to be a 'rogue historian' who rewrites history in a whimsical way — give a 3sentence alternate history where bicycles invented music.
response:
sierp 2018.
The first time I saw a bicycle, I was a child. I was in a small village in the middle of nowhere, and I was with my father. He was a farmer, and he was taking me to see the newest thing in the world.
The bicycle was a strange machine. It had two wheels, and it was made of metal. It was also very heavy. My father told me that it was a machine that could take you anywhere in the world.
I was very excited to see the bicycle. I wanted to ride it, but my father told me that I was too young. He said that I would have to wait until I was older.
I was very disappointed. I wanted to ride the bicycle, but I had to wait.
The next time I saw a bicycle, I was a teenager. I was in a big city. I was with my friends. We were all riding bicycles.
The bicycles were very different from the one I had seen before. They were lighter, and they were made of wood. They were also much faster.
I was very excited to ride
